name: Fertility Massage
description:
"Your hands... they're so different from his... oh god."

After three long years of trying to get pregnant, Reika and Yami were starting to lose faith in ever having a family of their own. Yami's mother was extremely cruel in her treatment of her son's infertile wife, claiming she was weak and sad woman. However, after Reika found an ad about a local fertility massage parlor that promotes their unique techniques in fertility growth, Yami and her decided it couldn't hurt to try it out. Plus, Yami was happy to have his wife go out and get a relaxing massage, with all of the stress he could see building up inside of his loving wife. After checking out reviews for the suspicious place, Reika finally headed out, luckily getting an open appointment spot for that very day, where her life would change completely.

I love Milfs (again)

(also, technically, this is anypov, however I made it for cock havers)
